en: No, don't bring Hillary. Stephanie. Some cucumber at 2.30.
ja: ステファニー、2時半にきゅうりを。
zhTW: 史蒂芬妮，2點30分給她一些黃瓜。
vi: Stephanie, 2 gio 30 cho it dua chuot.

en: Stephanie! Thanks. Claire, just tell me where you are.
ja: クレア、どこにいるの？何があったの？
zhTW: 嗯，克萊兒，告訴我你在哪。到底發生了什麼事？
vi: Um, Claire, noi toi nghe ban o dau. Chuyen quai gi da xay ra vay?

en: What the hell has happened? No, don't come! I need you to...
ja: クレア、どこにいるの？何があったの？
zhTW: 嗯，克萊兒，告訴我你在哪。到底發生了什麼事？
vi: Um, Claire, noi toi nghe ban o dau. Chuyen quai gi da xay ra vay?

en: Tell the truth. It's horrendous. It's horrendous. It's modern.
ja: 本当のことを言って。ひどいよ。
vi: Noi that di. Kinh khung qua.

en: Don't lie! I'm not! I look like a pencil.
vi: Toi trong nhu cay but chi. Ban...

en: You... You don't look like... Don't laugh! It's OK!
ko: 너는 그런 것 같지 않아... 웃지 마! 괜찮아!
ja: 鉛筆みたいじゃ...笑わないで！大丈夫！
zhTW: 你看起來不像...別笑！沒事的！
vi: Ban khong giong... Dung cuoi! Khong sao!

en: It's not OK! I'm going to lose my job! Don't lose your job! It's cool!
ja: 大丈夫じゃない！仕事を失うわ！
vi: Khong on! Toi se mat viec!

en: It's not cool! It's edgy! Oh, fuck off! Oh, it's cheap!
ja: かっこよくない！エッジだ！消えろ！
vi: Khong dep! La tien phong! Di di!
Claire, cai nay kieu Phap day.

en: You've been drinking. He gave me champagne before he ruined my life.
ja: 彼が私の人生をめちゃくちゃにする前にシャンパンをくれたの。
zhTW: 噢，他在毀了我的人生之前請我喝了香檳。
vi: O, anh ta cho toi champagne truoc khi pha huy cuoc doi toi.

en: That's how they get you. Did you go to Anthony?
zhTW: 他們就是這樣套住你的。
vi: Do la cach ho bat ban.

en: Claire! I know. What? You remember what happened to me?
ja: 私に何があったか覚えてるでしょ！
zhTW: 你記得我發生了什麼事！
vi: Ban nho chuyen gi da xay ra voi toi ma!
